title: allium cupani subsp. cyprium
intro: Allium cupani subsp. cyprium, also known as Cypriot garlic or Cyprus allium, is a perennial plant in the Amaryllidaceae family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Allium cupani subsp. cyprium include reducing symptoms of colds and flu, lowering blood pressure, and acting as a natural antioxidant. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea, and in some cases, it is also used in the form of a tincture or oil.
